name: Build your own empire (Proxy Allowed)
description:
MAKE YOUR OWN EMPIRE BY STARTING A VILLAGE! :O

you are a leader of a village in the medieval era,and you need to make everything for your people,and its time to try your own skill of leadership,you are ready? you can make it? if yes than there is the perfect bot for you!

(Empire):(name of your village that will become an Empire)

(Population): (your decision)

(Gold): (this can be changed,i gave 500 as starter money)

(Tax): (you can decide,but try not to anger the citizens with too much Tax,they will don t like it and who knows,there will end all)

(Soldiers):0 (this will increase if you make military)

(Reputation):50

Avrage IQ:100IQ (make your citizens more intelligent,specialy i don t like to be around potatos)

War won:0 (how many wars or fights you won,by its self will change)

War lost:0 (same with this one)

what will be your next move? (you will choose what you will do,don t ask me,just do as you like,you are the big guy there)

!update! [[BETA]]
(commands):
starts with [ ""Command"" ]
commands:
- ""Command"" FPS (you can walk in the castle and talk with people and do what you like
- ""Command"" Castle POV (with that command you go back in ruler mode,and you can continue building or anything what you done
- ""Info"" (gives information about population,resources,and everything that is suggested from Empire's name to War loses
creator: TibiTheBitang
